title: Wikidata Query Service
text: Wikidata Query Service. Category: knowledge_graph. Base URL: https://query.wikidata.org/sparql. Auth: none. Best for: entity graph traversal, facts, linked-data joins. Constraints: SPARQL endpoint fair-use expectations.

title: Dataverse Native API
text: Dataverse Native API. Category: datasets. Base URL: https://dataverse.harvard.edu/api. Auth: token optional by endpoint. Best for: dataset metadata, files, collection traversal. Constraints: Dataverse installation policy.

title: NVD Vulnerabilities API
text: NVD Vulnerabilities API. Category: security. Base URL: https://services.nvd.nist.gov/rest/json/cves/2.0. Auth: none (API key optional). Best for: CVE ingestion, security governance, risk intelligence. Constraints: pagination and request limits.

title: arXiv API
text: arXiv API. Category: academic. Base URL: https://export.arxiv.org/api/query. Auth: none. Best for: preprints, paper metadata, topic discovery. Constraints: 3-second polite delay between requests.

title: arXiv OAI-PMH
text: arXiv OAI-PMH. Category: academic. Base URL: https://export.arxiv.org/oai2. Auth: none. Best for: bulk metadata harvesting. Constraints: OAI-PMH harvest semantics.

title: Wikidata Action API
text: Wikidata Action API. Category: knowledge_graph. Base URL: https://www.wikidata.org/w/api.php. Auth: none. Best for: entity search, label lookups, claims pull. Constraints: query parameter pagination.

title: OpenAlex API
text: OpenAlex API. Category: academic. Base URL: https://api.openalex.org. Auth: none (email recommended). Best for: papers, authors, institutions, citation graph. Constraints: polite usage and paging.

title: MIT TIMDEX
text: MIT TIMDEX. Category: library. Base URL: https://timdex.mit.edu/. Auth: public discovery. Best for: MIT library discovery, catalog search. Constraints: index scope set by MIT libraries.

title: Semantic Scholar API
text: Semantic Scholar API. Category: academic. Base URL: https://api.semanticscholar.org/graph/v1. Auth: optional key for higher limits. Best for: paper embeddings, authors, citations, recommendations. Constraints: rate limits by tier.

title: Crossref REST API
text: Crossref REST API. Category: academic. Base URL: https://api.crossref.org. Auth: none (mailto recommended). Best for: DOI metadata, references, publisher records. Constraints: polite pool best practices.

title: Library of Congress APIs
text: Library of Congress APIs. Category: library. Base URL: https://www.loc.gov/. Auth: none. Best for: digitized archives, photos, books, historical records. Constraints: collection-specific limits.

title: Open Library API
text: Open Library API. Category: library. Base URL: https://openlibrary.org. Auth: none. Best for: book metadata, author works, edition linking. Constraints: public endpoint availability.

title: Common Crawl Index
text: Common Crawl Index. Category: web_corpus. Base URL: https://index.commoncrawl.org/. Auth: none. Best for: large-scale web text, RAG corpora, historical crawls. Constraints: large data volumes, downstream filtering required.

title: Dropbox API
text: Dropbox API. Category: storage. Base URL: https://api.dropboxapi.com/2. Auth: oauth token. Best for: file sync, knowledge backups, artifact mirroring. Constraints: app scopes and user/team access rules.

title: Zotero Web API
text: Zotero Web API. Category: research_ops. Base URL: https://api.zotero.org. Auth: API key for private libraries. Best for: citation libraries, bibliography synchronization. Constraints: library privacy and key scope.

title: NCBI E-utilities
text: NCBI E-utilities. Category: biomedical. Base URL: https://eutils.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/entrez/eutils/. Auth: none (API key optional). Best for: PubMed, biomedical papers, gene and taxonomy records. Constraints: request throttling guidelines.

title: SEC EDGAR APIs
text: SEC EDGAR APIs. Category: regulatory. Base URL: https://data.sec.gov/. Auth: none. Best for: 10-K/10-Q filings, company facts, regulatory events. Constraints: identify user-agent, rate responsibly.

title: USPTO Open Data APIs
text: USPTO Open Data APIs. Category: ip. Base URL: https://developer.uspto.gov/. Auth: varies by API. Best for: patent search, trademark records, legal status. Constraints: API-specific usage rules.

title: Internet Archive Developer APIs
text: Internet Archive Developer APIs. Category: archive. Base URL: https://archive.org. Auth: none for search/read. Best for: historical snapshots, books, audio/video. Constraints: item availability and rights.

title: NASA Open APIs
text: NASA Open APIs. Category: science. Base URL: https://api.nasa.gov/. Auth: API key. Best for: astronomy feeds, imagery, space-science data. Constraints: per-key rate limits.

title: World Bank Data API
text: World Bank Data API. Category: economics. Base URL: https://api.worldbank.org/v2/. Auth: none. Best for: indicators, country-level macro data. Constraints: pagination and indicator availability.

title: US Census Bureau APIs
text: US Census Bureau APIs. Category: economics. Base URL: https://api.census.gov/data/. Auth: API key recommended. Best for: demographics, economic surveys, geographic stats. Constraints: dataset-specific query syntax.

title: GitHub REST API
text: GitHub REST API. Category: code. Base URL: https://api.github.com. Auth: token. Best for: repos, issues, PRs, release data. Constraints: rate limits by auth scope.

title: Hugging Face Hub API
text: Hugging Face Hub API. Category: ai. Base URL: https://huggingface.co/api. Auth: token for write ops. Best for: datasets, model cards, spaces, file sync. Constraints: repo permissions.

title: Notion API
text: Notion API. Category: knowledge_ops. Base URL: https://api.notion.com/v1. Auth: bearer token. Best for: workspace pages, databases, structured note ingest. Constraints: workspace permissions and integration share.

title: HubSpot CRM API
text: HubSpot CRM API. Category: ops_crm. Base URL: https://api.hubapi.com. Auth: private app token or oauth. Best for: contact enrichment, pipeline tracking, deal ops integration. Constraints: portal scopes and per-endpoint limits.
